metadata.siteDescription: Professional League of Legends team match prediction app
metadata.homeDescription: Professional interface to predict LoL match winners using CSV data and a remote model.

footer.role: Junior ML Engineer & Full Stack Web Developer

predictor.title: Predict the winner between two teams with an ML model
predictor.description: Select teams, review their latest registered players, assign champions per player, and define bans for each side.
predictor.sameTeamError: You cannot select the same team on both sides.
predictor.predictionHint: When you click predict, we will send team, player, and ban data to the model API.
predictor.predictionPlaceholder: The prediction will appear here after querying the model.

errors.selectBothTeams: Select both teams to make a prediction.
